# AI Content Automation Pipeline

This project demonstrates a fully automated SEO content generation system.

Pipeline Flow

DataForSEO for   Keyword Extraction
Perplexity API for  Research
Claude Sonnet for Article Generation
Airtable for Content Storage
WordPress for Publishing

Business Use Case

Marketing agencies can generate and publish SEO content automatically using real search data.
